_comment: Canned demo prompts for Research Supercharged. Domain-agnostic defaults you can re-theme to any DSO research area. PUBLIC / UNCLASSIFIED topics only. Referenced by the Build-rail lab scripts via text_of(<id>).

search_recent.text: What are the most significant developments in solid-state battery research in the last two years? Summarise the top 3 and cite a source for each.
search_recent.note: Web Search — swap the topic to your own field.

compare_methods.text: Compare two leading approaches to perovskite solar cell stability. What are the trade-offs? Cite sources.
compare_methods.note: Web Search — shows synthesis across pages.

summarize_corpus.text: Using only the documents I uploaded, summarise the key findings and methods. Cite the specific source file for each point. If something isn't in the documents, say so.
summarize_corpus.note: File Search / RAG — grounded on assets/corpus.

specific_q.text: According to the uploaded documents, what evaluation metrics or datasets are used, and what are the reported results? Cite the source files.

convert_question.text: I measured a semiconductor band gap of 1.8 eV. What is that energy in joules? Use the converter tool and show the result.
convert_question.note: Function tool — forces a real unit conversion.
